title: Weekly mortgage demand from homebuyers increased despite big interest rate volatility
summary: Mortgage rates surged higher last week to due rising oil prices, causing a recent boom in refinancing to pull back.

title: Qatar’s LNG Shutdown Sends Shockwaves Through Global Gas Markets

title: Chevron and Shell Move Closer to New Oil Deals in Venezuela
summary: Chevron and Shell are reportedly close to sealing deals for oil production in Venezuela following the United States’ takeover of the country’s energy industry, Reuters wrote, citing unnamed sources.
